business_summary: Saturn Oil & Gas Inc. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of petroleum and natural gas resource deposits in Canada. The company is involved in the exploration and development of light oil assets in the Oxbow area of Southeast Saskatchewan; Viking light oil assets in West-Central Saskatchewan; and Cardium light oil assets in Central Alberta. Saturn Oil & Gas Inc. was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in Calgary, Canada.

acquisition_detected.message: Revenue saltó 90% en 2023 (371M → 705M). Probable adquisición — datos de Yahoo pueden ser parciales (no pro-forma). Crecimiento ajustado a tasas orgánicas (2-6%).
